title: Section 24
content: Where an order specified in 1[clause (ff) or clause (h) of sub-section (1) of section 104 of the Code of Civil Procedure, 1908 (5 of 1908),] is made by a Court of Small Causes, an appeal therefrom shall lie to the District Court 2]on any ground on which an appeal from such order would lie under that section].
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 9 of 1922, s. 5, for "section 588, clause ( 29), of the Code of Civil Procedure". 2. Ins. by s. 5, ibid.
